TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fahol, title = Fahol, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fahol} }

S.FORM: alang Fahol ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 133 buwan, 337 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 229 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 108 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 65%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fahol hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Fahol hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Fahol hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fahol hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Fahol hya' ga Alolong. tay 'llaw na Fahol hya' ga Kalotong. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Fahol ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 133 buwan, 337 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 229 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 108 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 65%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fahol hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Fahol hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Fahol hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fahol hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Fahol hya' ga Alolong. tay 'llaw na Fahol hya' ga Kalotong. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *aħol ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu koŋβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *aħol ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *aħol ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *aħol ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *aħol ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *aħol ħjaʔ ɣa aloloŋ. taj ʔllaw na *aħol ħjaʔ ɣa kalotoŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
